title: Benjia 1986 Poster Framed UK, Happy 40th Birthday Sign Card Party Decor Supplies Home Decoration Birthday Gift 40 Years Old Wedding Newspaper For Men Women (8x10 inch, Black Gold)

【High Quality Black Frame】The 1986 poster is pre-assembled in a great 8.8 x 10.8in frame. The inside of the frame includes a clear plastic panel on the front, a 1986 poster, and a hanger & sturdy stand on the back. It can be displayed hanging on a wall or standing on a table
【Premium Material】Poster made of thick cardboard, surface laminated durable for long-time use
【Perfect Gift】This classic 40th birthday decoration set is a perfect gift for men or women home decor. Suitable for so many occasions - birthday party, wedding or any time a special gift is needed

【What you get】1 pack 1986 poster card (pre-framed), 1 pack 8.8 x 10.8in frame; Each order is with friendly customer service and warm help; There is a film in the front glass of photo frame to prevent scratches during transportation, and you will get a brighter glass after uncovering it
